data.title: Royalty Pharma buys royalty in Amgen's Imdelltra for $885 million, with option to add $65 million more within a year.
data.description: On August 25, 2025, Royalty Pharma plc disclosed the acquisition of a royalty interest in Amgen’s Imdelltra, a groundbreaking DLL3 targeting bispecific T-cell engager (BiTE), from BeOne Medicines. The deal involved a significant $885 million upfront payment. Additionally, the agreement allows BeOne to potentially offload more Imdelltra royalties to Royalty Pharma for an extra $65 million in the coming year.

data.title: China Yuchai International's subsidiary may be listed on a foreign stock exchange, as announced on Aug. 25, 2025.
data.description: In Singapore on August 25, 2025, China Yuchai International Limited (NYSE: CYD) disclosed that one of its indirect subsidiaries is contemplating a listing on a foreign stock exchange. This subsidiary, referred to as the "Potential Listing Subsidiary," is evaluating this possibility. China Yuchai, a leading entity, shared this information without specifying the particular exchange in consideration.

data.title: Stock futures fall after gains on Friday as Fed hints at interest rate shift. Treasury bond yields: 10-year 4.26%, 2-year 3.71%. CME projects 87.3% chance of Fed cutting rates in Sept. Indices futures: Dow -0.19%, S&P 500 -0.24%, Nasdaq 100 -0.35%, Russell 2000 -0.05%. SPY down 0.20% at $644.01, QQQ down 0.27% at $570.42 in premarket. Notable stock movements: Workday Inc. down 3% after earnings, BJ's Wholesale Club down 8% post-revenue miss. Index performance on last session: Dow up 1.89%, S&P 500 up 1.52%, Nasdaq Composite up 1.88%, Russell 2000 up 3.86%. FedWatch tool predicts dovish shift after Powell's speech. Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: U.S. stock futures declined on Monday after a rise on Friday, with major benchmark indices lower. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell suggested a potential shift in interest rates next month during a speech at the annual Jackson Hole conference. President Trump initiated a national security investigation into furniture imports. 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.26%, two-year bond at 3.71%. CME Group's FedWatch tool hinted at an 87.3% chance of a rate cut in September. Futures change: Dow Jones -0.19%, S&P 500 -0.24%, Nasdaq 100 -0.35%, Russell 2000 -0.05%. SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF fell premarket. Workday Inc. shares dropped 3% after reporting Q2 results, BJ's Wholesale Club Holdings Inc. fell over 8% after a revenue miss. Dow Jones rose 1.89%, S&P 500 rose 1.52%, Nasdaq Composite gained 1.88%, and Russell 2000 surged 3.86%. Key numbers include Nasdaq Composite at 21,496.54, S&P 500 at 6,466.91, Dow Jones at 45,631.74, and Russell 2000 at 2,361.95. Market analysts foresee a significant dovish shift following Powell's speech.

data.title: Sigenergy hosts event in Hainan with 300 industry professionals to discuss solar-storage solutions for sustainable aquaculture.
data.description: In Sanya, China, on August 25, 2025, Sigenergy, a key player in energy innovation, held the long-awaited Sigenergy Day APAC in Hainan. More than 300 industry experts, partners, clients, and media attended this event to discuss the future of solar-storage technology.

data.title: Bitcoin's bull run possibly ended at $111K. Price drops to multi-week lows; retesting $100K and below expected. 5 Bitcoin updates to note.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin has recently dropped to its lowest point in several weeks, losing momentum towards reaching all-time high prices. Market analysts are now envisioning potential price targets for BTC to dip as low as $100,000 and below in the near future.

data.title: Theravance Biopharma finishes Phase 3 study on Ampreloxetine for orthostatic hypotension. Topline results expected in Q1 2026.
data.description: Expected to release key findings in the first quarter of 2026, with potential plans for accelerated New Drug Application (NDA) submission in the pipeline if successful. If granted approval, ampreloxetine has the ability to meet a significant gap in the market as the initial treatment capable of delivering lasting relief for the estimated 40,000 individuals in the United States experiencing symptomatic issues.

data.title: KuCoin launches "Anti-Phishing Month" campaign to educate users and protect against cyber threats.
data.description: In Providenciales, Turks and Caicos Islands, on August 25, 2025, KuCoin, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange, unveiled its "Anti-Phishing Month" crusade. This campaign incorporates user education, rewards, and technical safeguards in an effort to promote cybersecurity.

data.title: In Q2 2025, Wallarm reveals AI-Powered APIs as a prime target in the evolving API threat landscape.
data.description: In San Francisco on August 25, 2025, Wallarm, a prominent platform for API and agentic AI security, unveiled its Q2 2025 API ThreatStats Report. This report delves into the changing API threat environment, highlighting a significant increase in incidents.

data.title: QuickBooks' AI Dashboard Agent named top all-in-one tool in 2025 for real-time business insights by Software Experts.
data.description: In an announcement made on August 25, 2025, Software Experts declared QuickBooks' Intelligent AI Dashboard Agent as the top all-inclusive real-time business insights tool of the year. It has been applauded for revolutionizing the way businesses analyze and respond to essential data. The Intelligent AI Dashboard Agent is noted for its significant impact on enhancing decision-making processes within businesses.

data.title: Phosphorus names Sonu Shankar as President and COO to drive xIoT operations vision. Promotes its Chief Product Officer.
data.description: In Nashville on August 25, 2025, Phosphorus, a top provider of proactive security and management for the extended Internet of Things (xIoT), declared the appointment of Sonu Shankar, the Chief Product Officer, as the new President and Chief Operating Officer.

data.title: Dylan Walsh joins 13th annual Remember Me Thursday® global cause as featured luminary. #PetRescueAwareness #RanchoSantaFe
data.description: A well-known actor and advocate for animal welfare has taken on a leading role in promoting a significant campaign in Rancho Santa Fe, California. Set to debut on August 25, 2025, the Pet Rescue Awareness Campaign is anticipated to reach a wide audience through various social media platforms in a little over four weeks. This campaign marks the largest of its kind globally and is poised to make a real impact. Having been in development over the past thirteen years, this initiative is expected to draw significant attention and support.

data.title: Upcoming ETF filings suggest an influx of new crypto products, including leveraged meme coins & active strategies.Meta80% expected growth in options if October approval given.
data.description: As the October approval deadline approaches, fund managers are shifting their focus towards leveraged meme coins and active strategies. This change in direction comes as they aim to capitalize on market opportunities and potentially maximize returns. The move indicates a growing interest in high-risk assets among fund managers, with a notable increase in the adoption of leveraged meme coins and dynamic investment approaches. This strategic shift highlights a willingness to explore alternative investment options and embrace a more aggressive investment stance in the face of upcoming developments in the market.

data.title: Vizient in Irving, Texas, achieves ISO 9001 certification, showing dedication to quality, efficiency, supply chain.
data.description: A company based in Irving, Texas has recently received certification that confirms their dedication to quality management principles, operational efficiency, and supply chain management solutions. This acknowledgement highlights their strong commitment to maintaining high standards in their operations.
